role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) that seeks to achieve its investment objectives through the use of a call option strategy that combines a long position in one or more exchange-traded products that seek to track the performance of the NASDAQ-100® Index. The fund is non-diversified.
